arts.ttl: What future holds for five Leicester City players after transfer exits denied
arts.sum: Not only did Leicester City’s deadline day finish with no further additions to Ruud van Nistelrooy’s squad, but the first-team players who had been linked with moves away during the January window ended up staying put. City have 27 players in their senior squad and when there’s only 11 in the starting line-up each week, it can be hard to keep them all happy.

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirm Martinez ACL blow
arts.sum: Manchester United have confirmed that Lisandro Martinez sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury during Sunday’s defeat to Crystal Palace. Martinez was stretchered off the field during the 2-0 defeat to the Eagles at Old Trafford. The Argentina international appeared to sustain a serious knee injury and United have now confirmed the extent of the issue. arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man Utd release official statement confirming Lisandro Martinez's worst injury fears
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez came off during Manchester United's dismal 2-0 loss at home to Crystal Palace on Sunday, with the defender suffering what's turned out to be a serious knee injury

arts.ttl: Manchester United confident club are leading Gyokeres race
arts.sum: Manchester United are confident that the club are leading the race to sign Sporting striker Viktor Gyokeres. The Sweden international is a target for Europe’s top clubs after a prolific period in Portuguese football. Gyokeres has 77 goals in 83 appearances for Sporting and thrived under the management of Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim at […] The post Manchester United confident club are leading Gyokeres race first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: ‘Life has been sucked out of the players’ – Paul Scholes exposes Man United alarm bells
arts.sum: Manchester United have lost their last three Premier League matches and Paul Scholes has spotted something new with Ruben Amorim's side that he clearly isn't a fan of

arts.ttl: Man Utd icon sounds relegation warning to Ruben Amorim with brutal Ford Focus jibe
arts.sum: Man Utd are mired in 13th place in the Premier League, with one legendary former defender warning Ruben Amorim's side face being sucked into a fight to stay up

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro offers insight into Marcus Rashford's Man Utd exit with Ruben Amorim admission
arts.sum: Leny Yoro reveals Ruben Amorim's approach to poor trainers after Marcus Rashford's departure from Man Utd.

Manchester United will hope to bounce back from their 2-0 home loss to Crystal Palace when they take on Leicester in the FA Cup on Friday night. Ruben Amorim's side have lost five of their last seven ...

arts.ttl: Man United 'identify top striker target' for summer transfer window but Man City hold the trump card
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly ready to push for the signing of Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'I have close ties to Man Utd – this has been sucking the life out of players'
arts.sum: Manchester United and their players continue to struggle under newly-installed manager Ruben Amorim, and this Red Devils legend thinks he may have a suspicion as to why
